name: bulk_close
_note: sessions.bulk_close closes many caller-owned open/paused sessions in one sweep. Requires a valid outcome, then either an explicit sessionIds[] OR scope:'stale'. With no targets specified → no_targets. scope:'stale' on a live DB + assassin owner actor returns ok:true closing the caller's (zero, for the assassin) stale rows. idleDays is a fail-CLOSED numeric guard (invalid_idleDays). A write {} returns a real validation reason, NEVER no_db.
